LanguageData.ARA_DummyAmmo.label: ammunition
LanguageData.ARA_DummyAmmo.description: Ammunition used by the Arachne Zerg.
LanguageData.ARA_Filth_SpentAcid.label: Arachne acid residue
LanguageData.ARA_Turret_Beespikeshooter.label: Bee Sting Shooter
LanguageData.ARA_Turret_Beespikeshooter.description: A small turret that shoots poisonous stingers.
LanguageData.ARA_Gun_Beespikeshooter.label: Bee Sting Shooter
LanguageData.ARA_Gun_Beespikeshooter.description: Tissue that fires small venomous stingers.
LanguageData.Arachnae_BanelingTrap.label: Arachne explodes cocoon
LanguageData.Arachnae_BanelingTrap.description: 一种阿拉克涅休眠茧，内藏有休眠中的阿拉克涅虫族。 If you get too close, the Zerg within will be awakened.
LanguageData.ARA_AutoSniperCannon.label: Blood Chain Gigacannon Organization
LanguageData.ARA_AutoSniperCannon.description: One of the organizations used by the Arachne Zerg to defend their lair. It is composed of a large number of highly specialized organs without autonomous consciousness. It can continuously fire thorns at a high rate of fire, severely damaging large enemies or invading groups. As an Arachne defense organization, it can generate its own replenishment ammunition by obtaining nutrients.
LanguageData.Gun_ARA_AutoSniperCannonTurret.label: Blood Chain Gigabit Cannon
LanguageData.ARA_Baneling_AutoMortar.label: Explosive species projection nest tissue
LanguageData.ARA_Baneling_AutoMortar.description: One of the organizations used by the Arachne Zerg to defend their lair. It is composed of a large number of highly specialized organs that have no independent consciousness. It can launch multiple Arachne Explosion Seed auxiliary insects at enemies that invade the lair. These auxiliary insects will find their own targets to launch suicide attacks. As an Arachne defense organization, it can generate its own replenishment ammunition by obtaining nutrients.
LanguageData.ARA_Baneling_Artillery_AutoMortar.label: Explosive Seed Projection Nest
LanguageData.ArachnaeBase_Race_Baneling_Proj.label: Arachne Explosive Species
LanguageData.CatastropheMissileSilo.label: Natural Disaster Acid Burning Organization
LanguageData.CatastropheMissileSilo.description: One of the ultimate biological weapons evolved by the Arachne Zerg. It is composed of a large number of highly specialized organs that have no independent consciousness. The terrifying acid-burning cannon can launch natural disaster acid-burning missiles that are terrifying to all living beings. As a composite defense system, it can launch missiles at local targets and carry out precision strikes at distant threats. It can generate supplementary ammunition by itself by obtaining nutrients.
LanguageData.CatastropheMissile_Weapon.label: Natural disaster acid burning cannon
LanguageData.CatastropheMissile_Weapon.description: The main structure of the Scourge Acid Burning Cannon organization, responsible for launching and guiding the semi-autonomous Scourge Acid Burning Missiles.
LanguageData.ARA_CatastropheMissile_Shell.label: Scourge Acid Burn Missile
LanguageData.ARA_CatastropheMissile_Shell.description: The Scourge Acid Burning Missile used by the Arachne Zerg, only the Scourge Acid Burning Cannon Organization can launch it.
LanguageData.Projectile_CatastropheMissile.label: Scourge Acid Burn Missile
LanguageData.Projectile_CatastropheMissile_Fake.label: Scourge Acid Burn Missile
